message:
Add ErrorBoundary component with fallback UI and retry

- Created reusable ErrorBoundary class component for React error handling
- Three variants: default (centered card), inline, minimal
- Includes retry button functionality and error logging
- Added withErrorBoundary HOC for easy component wrapping
- Wrapped main content and SpotlightSearch in Providers

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-897

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
